textByHash.26f8bebfc54dfb13244f7c9b835940d67dfb6de0: Because I told you about the treasure.
textByHash.5b81bd5da9c20803dd70307b6a1cb19e9638adbe: It will do when I find it. I just need to get into this blasted waterfall I've been washed downstream three times already.
textByHash.7361f9da0af78d0f6c572b88dee0e89cfdb8371c: You stole my treasure. I saw you!
textByHash.782b6e747ce2774f2d8ae5d1e96b2c266bf9f4dd: It looks like you need the help.
textByHash.90c64faa251530f6a62b179dc8b6dcdc30c670f6: Don't play nice with me, I know you're looking for the treasure too.
textByHash.984b8ef78bdbc5935459dd275d9750e5c4f42153: Just because I'm small doesn't mean I'm dumb! If I told you, you would take it all for yourself.
textByHash.ab9d60520a9df838c59d7a988c7b7f76d5d3479c: Oh it's you, trying to find my treasure again are you?
textByHash.b261a922f5e9319d62be68dd03c64d8bd54336f2: You do understand that anything you find you have to share with me.
textByHash.b9206896b303e51fe03aa32c0d7b168ee25f8a6d: I'll find that treasure soon, just you wait and see.
textByHash.bd9277129ba4e8f0f08d38227f86d7429d5f473d: Not you still, why don't you give up?
